title: Schemas / XanaNode Node Types v0.3.0
summary: A canonical schema or registry artifact published as XanaNode Node Types v0.3.0.
content:
{
  "version": "0.3.0",
  "node_types": [
    {
      "type": "person",
      "label": "Person",
      "color": {
        "bg": "#8bd3ff",
        "fg": "#071827",
        "outline": "#d8f1ff"
      },
      "purpose": "A human actor who created, influenced, witnessed, argued, documented, or participated in something.",
      "allowed_subtypes": [
        "writer",
        "researcher",
        "engineer",
        "critic",
        "artist",
        "founder",
        "scientist",
        "programmer",
        "fictional_character"
      ],
      "required_frontmatter": [
        "title",
        "type",
        "importance",
        "summary",
        "relationships"
      ],
      "recommended_frontmatter": [
        "roles",
        "primary_media",
        "people",
        "concepts",
        "sources",
        "projects",
        "events"
      ],
      "editable_fields": [
        {
          "key": "gender",
          "label": "Gender",
          "value_kind": "enum",
          "help": "Use this when it matters to the record or to kinship inference. Leave it blank when unknown, irrelevant, or not yours to assert.",
          "options": [
            { "value": "female", "label": "Female" },
            { "value": "male", "label": "Male" },
            { "value": "nonbinary", "label": "Nonbinary" },
            { "value": "unknown", "label": "Unknown" }
          ]
        },
        {
          "key": "birth_date",
          "label": "Birth date",
          "value_kind": "date",
          "help": "A human-readable or machine-readable birth date for this person."
        },
        {
          "key": "death_date",
          "label": "Death date",
          "value_kind": "date",
          "help": "A human-readable or machine-readable death date for this person."
        },
        {
          "key": "nationality",
          "label": "Nationality",
          "value_kind": "string",
          "help": "Useful when it helps disambiguate identity or historical context."
        },
        {
          "key": "occupation",
          "label": "Occupation",
          "value_kind": "string",
          "help": "A short role label such as writer, engineer, or teacher."
        },
        {
          "key": "aliases",
          "label": "Aliases",
          "value_kind": "string_list",
          "help": "Other names, spellings, or handles for this person."
        }
      ],
      "namespace": "xananode",
      "id": "xananode:person",
      "core": true,
      "extends": null,
      "projection": {
        "icon": "person",
        "icon_label": "P",
        "asset_path": "assets/projection/node-types/person.svg",
        "subtype_asset_path_template": "assets/projection/node-subtypes/person/{subtype}.svg"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "concept",
      "label": "Concept",
      "color": {
        "bg": "#91f2a6",
        "fg": "#062010",
        "outline": "#dcffe4"
      },
      "purpose": "An idea, pattern, theory, failure mode, or explanatory structure. A concept is built from claims.",
      "allowed_subtypes": [
        "theory",
        "principle",
        "failure_mode",
        "method",
        "pattern",
        "distinction",
        "frame"
      ],
      "required_frontmatter": [
        "title",
        "type",
        "importance",
        "summary",
        "relationships"
      ],
      "recommended_frontmatter": [
        "claims",
        "concepts",
        "sources",
        "people",
        "projects"
      ],
      "namespace": "xananode",
      "id": "xananode:concept",
      "core": true,
      "extends": null,
      "projection": {
        "icon": "concept",
        "icon_label": "C",
        "asset_path": "assets/projection/node-types/concept.svg",
        "subtype_asset_path_template": "assets/projection/node-subtypes/concept/{subtype}.svg"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "claim",
      "label": "Claim",
      "color": {
        "bg": "#ff6b6b",
        "fg": "#1a0000",
        "outline": "#ffe0e0"
      },
      "purpose": "A specific assertion that can be supported, disputed, revised, deprecated, or rejected.",
      "allowed_subtypes": [
        "definition",
        "historical",
        "causal",
        "interpretive",
        "predictive",
        "normative",
        "comparative"
      ],
      "required_frontmatter": [
        "title",
        "type",
        "importance",
        "summary",
        "status",
        "relationships"
      ],
      "recommended_frontmatter": [
        "confidence",
        "claim_type",
        "evidence",
        "counterevidence",
        "concepts",
        "sources"

      "projection": {

        "subtype_asset_path_template": "assets/projection/node-subtypes/claim/{subtype}.svg"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "source",
      "label": "Source",
      "color": {
        "bg": "#ff9f7a",
        "fg": "#2a1208",
        "outline": "#ffe4d9"
      },
      "purpose": "A reference work, transcript, paper, book, talk, article, dataset, or primary evidence item.",
      "allowed_subtypes": [
        "book",
        "paper",
        "article",
        "transcript",
        "talk",
        "interview",
        "dataset",

      "required_frontmatter": [
        "title",
        "type",
        "importance",
        "summary",
        "relationships"
      ],
      "recommended_frontmatter": [

        "year",
        "source_url",
        "archive_url",
        "license",
        "rights_status"
      ],
      "editable_fields": [
        {
          "key": "author",
          "label": "Author",
          "value_kind": "string",
          "help": "The credited human or organizational author of the source."
        },
        {

          "label": "Year",
          "value_kind": "string",
          "help": "The publication year or best-known year for this source."
        },
        {
          "key": "source_url",
          "label": "Source URL",
          "value_kind": "url",
          "help": "The primary online location for this source when one exists."
        },
        {
          "key": "archive_url",
          "label": "Archive URL",
          "value_kind": "url",
          "help": "A preserved or alternate online location for this source."
        },
        {
          "key": "license",
          "label": "License",
          "value_kind": "string",
          "help": "The license or reuse terms that apply to this source."
        },
        {
          "key": "rights_status",
          "label": "Rights status",
          "value_kind": "string",
          "help": "A short description of rights, restrictions, or ownership status."
        }
      ],
      "namespace": "xananode",

      "extends": null,

    },

      "allowed_subtypes": [
